name: Spicy Spaghetti Sauce with Pepperoni (Cchc94c)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine all ingredients except pepperoni.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is thickened (15 to 20 minutes).
4. Stir in pepperoni; continue cooking until heated through (4 to 5 minutes).
5. Serve over spaghetti.
